span.p:
Customer picks mentor + service + slot,
enters name + email

span.p: Error: a valid email is required

span.p: Error: that time is not available

span.p: Find or create user by email

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Read active service price
Insert booking (status = confirmed)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Triggers fire automatically:
set slot_end (= slot + duration)
set meeting_url (Jitsi, if video service)
lock specific_availability slot
status email

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Insert customer_payments (mock 'paid')
Insert mentor_payouts (price x ppp, 'pending')
Save intake question answers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CONFIRMED
Confirmation email + .ics to mentee / mentor / admin
